case_title: KENNETH EKWENNA VS. NELSON A JIMINEZ PORTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EKWENNA, KENNETH JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL ALBERT KELLY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-01-2005 THROUGH OCT-30-2005.

BALANCE OF FEE PAID FOR TRANSACTION B1205617F002 BY DEFENDANT PORTILLO, NELSON A JIMINEZ GARCIA, JOSE
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-20-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED DEC-06-2005 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EKWENNA, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTILLO, NELSON A JIMINEZ GARCIA, JOSE THE TOTAL SUM OF $7500.00. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF KENNETH EKWENNA.
